playbook.intent: A signed SOW becomes a delivered project: kickoff, requirements baseline, delivery in waves, change-controlled scope, final acceptance, retainer-or-referral conversation. Net margin and NPS measured.
playbook.scope: A signed SOW becomes a delivered project: kickoff, requirements baseline, delivery in waves, change-controlled scope, final acceptance, retainer-or-referral conversation. Net margin and NPS measured.

success-criteria.criterion: All 6 stages have written outputs in the project record
Each stage's decision gate was answered before advancing (yes / no in writing)
Final stage produced the required written decision artifact
Every methodology reference loaded cleanly via `faion get-content`

stage.name: Kickoff
stage.intent: Translate signed SOW into a baselined plan.

tasks.task: Run a 60-min kickoff covering scope, RACI, success criteria, change process
Baseline schedule, scope, and acceptance criteria into the project doc
Set the weekly status cadence and channel

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when client has signed the kickoff summary acknowledging scope.

stage.name: Requirements Baseline
stage.intent: Lock the requirements at a level of detail you can deliver against.

tasks.task: Run elicitation sessions for any ambiguous spec items
Write acceptance criteria for every deliverable
Map traceability from requirements to deliverables

stage.decision-gate: Advance when every deliverable has acceptance criteria and a traceability row.

stage.name: Delivery Wave 1
stage.intent: First slice ships under cadence with risk register live.

tasks.task: Deliver the first wave per the schedule with weekly demos
Run a risk register; review weekly with one mitigation per top-3 risk
Send the weekly client status report on a fixed day

stage.decision-gate: Advance when wave-1 acceptance criteria are signed off by the client.

stage.name: Change-Controlled Scope
stage.intent: Any new ask flows through change control.

tasks.task: Tag every new request as in-scope, change-request, or rejected
Price change requests using the rubric; no free additions
Update the baseline only when a CR is signed

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when no in-flight unpriced work exists at end of stage.

stage.name: Final Acceptance
stage.intent: Pass UAT and get the signoff signature.

tasks.task: Run UAT against the acceptance-criteria table
Fix UAT findings until criteria pass at the agreed bar
Get written client signoff and final invoice paid

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when signoff is in writing AND final invoice is paid.

stage.name: Retainer or Referral Conversation
stage.intent: Convert delivery into recurring or referral.

tasks.task: Hold the post-delivery review with the buyer; ask for a referral
Pitch a retainer or maintenance plan with a starting number
Measure project margin and NPS; log lessons learned

stage.decision-gate: Required output: explicit yes/no on retainer AND a logged lessons-learned doc.
